Test Scenario: Authenticate with a valid username and password
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Enter a valid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system accepts the credentials, returns a successful response and provides a non-empty authentication token.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication with a valid username and invalid password
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Enter an invalid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the authentication attempt, does not return a valid token and provides an appropriate unauthorized or validation response.

Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Omit the username field. 3) Enter a valid password. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and identifies the missing or invalid username.

Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a valid username. 3) Omit the password field. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and identifies the missing or invalid password.

Test Scenario: Attempt authentication with blank username and password values
Test Steps: 1) Open the authentication request. 2) Enter a blank username value. 3) Enter a blank password value. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the request, does not return an authentication token and provides an appropriate validation or unauthorized response.

Requirement ID: BOOK-001; BOOK-002; BOOK-003; BOOK-004; BOOK-005; BOOK-006; BOOK-007; BOOK-008
Test Scenario: Create a booking using valid required and optional information
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14; Additional needs=Breakfast
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter a valid first name and last name. 3) Enter a positive total price. 4) Enter a valid deposit-paid value. 5) Enter a valid check-in date. 6) Enter a checkout date after the check-in date. 7) Enter optional additional needs. 8) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system creates the booking, returns a unique booking ID and returns the submitted booking information accurately.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking without a first name
Test Data: First name is omitted; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Omit the first-name field. 3) Enter valid values in all other required fields. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies the missing or invalid first name.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking without booking dates
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Booking dates are omitted
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer, price and deposit information. 3) Omit the booking-dates object or fields. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies the missing booking dates.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking with checkout date before check-in date
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=450; Deposit paid=true; Check-in=2026-08-14; Checkout=2026-08-10
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer, price and deposit information. 3) Enter a check-in date. 4) Enter a checkout date earlier than the check-in date. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and provides a clear date-validation response.

Test Scenario: Attempt to create a booking with a total price of zero
Test Data: First name=Dhruba; Last name=Aryal; Total price=0; Deposit paid=false; Check-in=2026-08-10; Checkout=2026-08-14
Test Steps: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer and date information. 3) Enter zero as the total price. 4) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system rejects the booking, does not create a valid booking ID and identifies that the total price must be greater than zero.
